sentences.text: Hi, Rosa. This is Katie giving you a call from rental just want to follow up to see how and November was doing in Cleveland and see if we could meet you have any assistance direct line is two two four five seven seven five zero four eight thanks so much.

Thank you for calling the Vinci Group. If you know your party's extension you may dial it at any time for a dial by name directory please press one. By using the keys on your touch tone phone. Please enter the first or last name of the party you wish to reach press Star at anytime to return to the main menu. To reach a V E N D AT&T B L a K E press one to reach a V E N D AT&T L I V a press to pick up your call is being transferred please hold. You have reached New York office of the fence Group. If you would like to reach like Bend that executive Vice President please press one. If you would like to reach lines defend that director of marketing, please press two, otherwise press zero and you will return.
Hi, you've reached fila. I am away from my desk or on another call. Please leave a message and I'll call you back.
